docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-18-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EQUIFAX INC.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DROTTS, JOEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DROTTS, JOEL AS TO DEFENDANT EQUIFAX INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DROTTS, JOEL AS TO DEFENDANT EQUIFAX INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT EQUIFAX INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DROTTS, JOEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT EQUIFAX INC. THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT ANY ACT, OMISSION OR BREACH OF ANY DUTY BY THE DEFENDANT WAS A CAUSE OF DAMAGE, LOSS OR HARM TO THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-07-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-07-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF JOEL DROTTS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EQUIFAX INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY LATONYA MUNSNON, LEGAL SUPPORT ASSOCIATE. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2017 - JUDGMENT.
